messages.author: swarm
messages.text: This ticket needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve" to approve it.

messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: Filed-intake Telegram confirmation links to the file's GitHub permalink
What it solves: WHAT: today operator_file_question.bb replies to the human with
reply-text = "Filed for the swarm: backlog/INTAKE-<slug>.md" (line ~32) — a
plain repo-relative path the human cannot click. Make it a clickable GitHub
permalink to the file at the commit that just filed it.
How it works: The filed-intake confirmation contains a github.com blob permalink at the filing commit's SHA for the intake's path

messages.author: swarm
messages.text: BL-415 - Filed-intake Telegram confirmation links to the file's GitHub permalink is complete.
